# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

admin:
  access_log_path: "/tmp/admin_access.log"
  address:
    socket_address: { address: "127.0.0.1", port_value: 8001 }
static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: "127.0.0.1", port_value: 80 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        config:
          codec_type: AUTO
          stat_prefix: ingress_cx
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: service_1
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match: { prefix: "/api/service-one" }
                route: { cluster: service_cluster_1 }
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.router
  clusters:
  - name: service_cluster_1
    connect_timeout: "0.25s"
    type: STRICT_DNS
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: service_cluster_1
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint: { address: { socket_address: { address: "service-one.example.com", port_value: 80 } } }
    health_checks:
    - event_sample_rate: 100
      healthy_threshold: 2
      unhealthy_threshold: 5
      timeout: "5s"
      interval: "30s"
      type: HTTP
      http_health_check:
        path: "/ping"
        port_value: 80
    common_http_protocol_options: {}
